name: Python
desc: TIOBE榜首，AI/数据科学绝对霸主，GitHub增长最快语言。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: TIOBE #1, absolute leader in AI/data science, fastest growing language on GitHub.

name: JavaScript
desc: Stack Overflow使用率最高，Web开发核心，全栈必备。数据源: survey.stackoverflow.co
desc_en: Stack Overflow highest usage, core of web development, essential for full-stack.

name: TypeScript
desc: GitHub第一语言，JS超集，大型项目首选。数据源: octoverse.github.com

name: C
desc: TIOBE第二，系统编程基础，嵌入式开发主力。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: TIOBE #2, foundation of systems programming, mainstay of embedded development.

name: Java
desc: TIOBE第三，企业级应用主力，Android开发语言。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: TIOBE #3, enterprise application mainstay, primary Android language.

name: C++
desc: TIOBE第四，系统编程、游戏开发、高性能计算。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: TIOBE #4, systems programming, game development, high-performance computing.

name: Go
desc: 云原生首选，并发支持优秀，SO最受推崇语言第五。数据源: survey.stackoverflow.co
desc_en: Cloud-native preferred, excellent concurrency support.

name: Rust
desc: SO最受推崇语言第一，72%开发者想继续使用，安全高性能。数据源: survey.stackoverflow.co
desc_en: SO #1 most admired language, safe and high-performance.

name: SQL
desc: SO使用率58.6%，数据库操作必备，数据工程师核心技能。数据源: survey.stackoverflow.co
desc_en: SO 58.6% usage, essential for database operations.

name: C#
desc: TIOBE第五，.NET主力，游戏开发Unity。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: TIOBE #5, .NET mainstay, Unity game development.

name: PHP
desc: TIOBE第六，Web服务器端经典语言，CMS构建主流。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: TIOBE #6, classic server-side web language.

name: R
desc: 数据科学标配，统计分析、生物信息学必备。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: Data science standard, essential for statistical analysis and bioinformatics.

name: Swift
desc: Apple主力语言，iOS/macOS开发首选，安全性高。数据源: tiobe.com

name: Kotlin
desc: Android官方语言，Google推荐，简洁安全。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: Android official language, Google recommended, concise and safe.

name: Ruby
desc: Rails框架缔造者，Web开发高效简洁，DevOps常用。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: Creator of Rails framework, efficient and clean web development.

name: MATLAB
desc: 工程仿真、科学计算标配，MATLAB生态系统强大。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: Standard for engineering simulation and scientific computing.

name: Scala
desc: JVM系函数式语言，大数据处理 Spark 主力语言。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: JVM functional language, Spark main language for big data.

name: Objective-C
desc: Apple历史语言， legacy iOS/macOS 代码维护。数据源: tiobe.com

name: Perl
desc: 文本处理之王，系统管理、Bioinformatics 常用。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: King of text processing, commonly used in sysadmin and bioinformatics.

name: Dart
desc: Flutter 主力语言，跨平台 UI 开发新秀。数据源: tiobe.com

name: Zig
desc: 系统编程新星，替代C的性能与现代安全。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: Rising star in systems programming, C replacement with modern safety.

name: Elixir
desc: Erlang VM上的函数式语言，高并发电信系统。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: Functional language on Erlang VM, high-concurrency telecom systems.

name: Clojure
desc: Lisp方言，函数式编程，JVM上的并发之王。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: Lisp dialect, functional programming, concurrency king on JVM.

name: Haskell
desc: 纯函数式语言，学术研究、编译器设计常用。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: Pure functional language, commonly used in academic research.

name: Lua
desc: 嵌入式脚本之王，游戏开发、配置脚本常用。数据源: tiobe.com
desc_en: King of embedded scripting, commonly used in game development.
